calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion to Compel Answers to First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, discovery matter. Please call and calendar in the Discovery Department. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Petitioner People Of The State Of California'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People Of The State Of California'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
